title: Settings
subtitle: Manage your profile, preferences, and account.

profile.displayNameHelp: Shown on the leaderboard instead of your avatar only.
profile.emailHelp: Your email address cannot be changed here.
profile.updatedDescription: Your settings have been saved successfully.

avatar.updatedDescription: Your new profile picture looks great!
avatar.uploadErrorDescription: Please make sure the 'avatars' storage bucket exists and is public.
avatar.presetUpdated: Your fun new avatar is set!

language.title: Language
language.description: Choose the language for the interface. This setting is saved on your profile and follows you across devices.
language.savedDescription: Your language preference has been updated.

ai.title: AI Model
ai.description: Choose which AI model powers your tutor and content generation.
ai.preferencesDescription: Choose which AI model powers your intelligent tutor, quizzes, and summaries.
ai.savedDescription: Your tutor is now powered by {{name}}.

header.title: Settings
header.subtitle: Manage your account preferences and profile details

security.title: Security
security.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 6 characters
security.currentIncorrectDescription: Please check your current password and try again.
security.passwordUpdatedDescription: Your password has been changed successfully.

data.title: Data & Privacy
data.exportDescription: Download all your data as a JSON file (Art. 20 GDPR)
data.deleteDescription: Permanently delete your account and all associated data. This action cannot be undone.
data.deleteConfirmShort: Are you sure? All data will be permanently deleted.
data.deleteConfirm: Are you absolutely sure? This will permanently delete your account and all your data. Type DELETE to confirm.
data.deleteSuccessDescription: Your account and all data have been removed.

savedDescription: Your settings have been saved successfully.
